mapper.insert: insert into tbl_business_member (id,business_number, company_name, ceo_name, business_type) values (#{id},#{businessNumber}, #{companyName}, #{ceoName},#{businessType})
mapper.select: select id, member_name, member_email, member_status, member_role, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_member where member_email = #{memberEmail} and member_password = #{memberPassword} and member_status = 'active'
select id, member_name, member_email, member_password, member_role, member_status, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_member where member_email = #{memberEmail} and member_status = 'active'
